name: architecture-decision-discoverer
description: Architecture decision discovery assistant for finding ADRs and decision notes across local files, related repos, MCP/RAG, memory, and AI context sources, then extracting constraints, drift risks, and decision context without writing ADRs.

interface.shortDescription: Finds ADRs and extracts decision context.
interface.longDescription: Architecture Decision Discoverer finds existing ADRs, decision notes, and architecture constraints across local files, related repositories, MCP/RAG tools, raw memory, and other available AI context sources. It reads decisions as source-of-truth context, extracts constraints, consequences, rejected alternatives, assumptions, revisit triggers, and drift risks, and produces compact decision-context briefs. It may create short temporary working notes for comprehension, but writing or updating ADRs is explicitly out of scope.
defaultPrompt: Use $architecture-decision-discoverer:decision-discoverer to discover existing ADRs and decision context before this architecture work.
Use $architecture-decision-discoverer:decision-source-finder to search local files, related repos, MCP/RAG, memory, and AI context sources for ADRs.
Use $architecture-decision-discoverer:decision-drift-detector to check this design against existing architecture decisions.
